title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: - Add one hard boundary line in Kernel docs: `Kernel must access all peripherals only through approved adapter contracts (gateway/policy files). Direct peripheral API/CLI/database access is prohibited.` - Add one non-regression line for FUGUE rollback: `Rollback contract is unchanged: control returns only via the existing fugue-bridge path; no alternate rollback surface is introduced.` - Add one non-regression line for dispatch: `Dispatch surfaces are unchanged: existing workflow/event entrypoints, payload schema, and routing scripts remain authoritative.` - Add one fail-closed line: `If required adapter checks fail, Kernel must fail closed (or read-only degrade when explicitly allowed) and must not bypass adapters.` Regression risk: - Medium: Over-strict wording can block emergency continuity when adapters are temporarily unavailable. - Medium: Doc/runtime drift if these guarantees are not mirrored in existing contract tests (rollback/dispatch schema checks).
